OpenClaw adoption in China is accelerating across all the platform.

Tencent cloud is https://t.co/3sn8oldX02

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Big moment for China's auto industry as it surpassed Japan to become Australia's top src of cars in February. This ends Japan's 28 yr reign in Australia.

There were 4 Chinese automakers in top 10, led by BYD w/ 5.8% mkt share. They accounted for 19% mkt share in total. https://t.co/aD9UUCAxUG

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
HW displayed a bunch of really impressive tech @ MWC2026 this past wk.

For AI, it showcased Atlas 950 SuperPoD (8192 card) + Atlas 850E server (for inference).

For CPU server, it showcased Taishan-950 SuperPoD, Taishan-500 & Taishan-200 servers for high, medium & low end https://t.co/Sv98i3LZZQ

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
China has transferred Long March-8A Rocket to Launch Pad for upcoming mission.

LM-8A can launch 7t to SSO. It will be a major part of China's LEO constellation launch program. https://t.co/VW5v9Zj5tb

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Chang'e 7 is planned for 2026 to explore the lunar south pole for resources. One main goal of mission is to find water.

It's equipped with a pioneering hopping vehicle that will  conduct the first-ever close-up exploration of lunar shadowed craters. https://t.co/1VycdKB5U9

Looks like energy mkt not a fan of this escalation on energy infrastructure.

More of these large BYD SUVs are now entering different Latam markets. https://t.co/8Y4nI1mQuS

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
A couple of more updates:
Iran's attack pace actually picked up today, most since day4.
Targeting now at Ben Gurion Airport which is widely used by USAF tankers for attack missions.
Now that Israeli AD is degraded, big Q is just whether IRGC BM can suppress sorties out of Israel https://t.co/3OJLmfGVBj

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:

Also, US bases facing Iraqi shiites attacks & possible other shiite population in GCC. https://t.co/8xQz82hmNJ
